SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am12
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Client.ClientController

Class ClientController

java.lang.Object
java.rmi.server.RemoteObject
java.rmi.server.RemoteServer
java.rmi.server.UnicastRemoteObject
it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Client.ClientController.ClientController
All Implemented Interfaces:
ClientStub, Serializable, Remote
Direct Known Subclasses:
ClientControllerRMI, ClientControllerSocket
public class ClientController extends UnicastRemoteObject implements ClientStub
The controller of the client. It manages the communication with the server or the communication layer of the client and receives the updates to send to the ViewModel
See Also:

    Description

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addViewModelListener(UserInterface ui)
    Add a UserInterface as a listener of the ViewModel
    void
    catchException(Exception e)
    Handle an exception from the server and update the error message in the ViewModel
    void
    catchMessage(Update update)
    Receive an update from the server and modify the ViewModel accordingly
    void
    connectionLostHandler()
    Handles the connection loss: signals the connection loss and closes the connection
    Timer
    getPingTimer()
    Getter method for the ping timer
    Timer
    getPongTimeoutTimer()
    Getter method for the pong timer
    void
    invokePongRMI()
    RMI pong equivalent: this method represents an invocation that is done to answer a ping invocation
    void
    resetPongTimeoutTimer()
    Reset the pong timeout timer
    void
    sendMessage(Message message)
    Send a message to the server.
    void
    setVirtualView(String nickname)
    If the connection is RMI, sets the VirtualView remote object by a lookup in RMI registry.
    void
    startPingPong()
    Starts the ping-pong mechanism: schedules a task to send ping at fixed intervals, then calls a method to schedule another task that checks if a pong is received withing the pong timeout

  • Constructor Details

    • ClientController

      public ClientController(String ip, int port) throws RemoteException
      Class constructor
      Parameters:
      ip - the ip address of the server
      port - the port of the client connection
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if remote communication with the RMI registry failed

  • Method Details

    • addViewModelListener

      public void addViewModelListener(UserInterface ui)
      Add a UserInterface as a listener of the ViewModel
      Parameters:
      ui - the UserInterface

    • sendMessage

      public void sendMessage(Message message)
      Send a message to the server. This method will be overridden by ClientControllerRMI and ClientControllerSocket
      Parameters:
      message - the message to send

    • catchMessage

      public void catchMessage(Update update)
      Receive an update from the server and modify the ViewModel accordingly
      Specified by:
      catchMessage in interface ClientStub
      Parameters:
      update - the received update

    • catchException

      public void catchException(Exception e)
      Handle an exception from the server and update the error message in the ViewModel
      Parameters:
      e - the Exception to handle

    • startPingPong

      public void startPingPong()
      Starts the ping-pong mechanism: schedules a task to send ping at fixed intervals, then calls a method to schedule another task that checks if a pong is received withing the pong timeout

    • resetPongTimeoutTimer

      public void resetPongTimeoutTimer()
      Reset the pong timeout timer

    • connectionLostHandler

      public void connectionLostHandler()
      Handles the connection loss: signals the connection loss and closes the connection

    • getPingTimer

      public Timer getPingTimer()
      Getter method for the ping timer
      Returns:
      a Timer object, which is the ping timer

    • getPongTimeoutTimer

      public Timer getPongTimeoutTimer()
      Getter method for the pong timer
      Returns:
      a Timer object, which is the pong timeout timer

    • invokePongRMI

      public void invokePongRMI()
      RMI pong equivalent: this method represents an invocation that is done to answer a ping invocation
      Specified by:
      invokePongRMI in interface ClientStub

    • setVirtualView

      public void setVirtualView(String nickname)
      If the connection is RMI, sets the VirtualView remote object by a lookup in RMI registry. The method is implemented in the ClientControllerRMI.
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the user who owns the VirtualView.
